name: The Infinite Love
original_name: ปาฏิหาริย์รัก
overview:
A romantic story between two guys and a girl.

Davika and Pawee were a couple but due to an accident, she thought he was dead. Davika eventually moves on with Chatchawin, who was always by her side and helped heal her broken heart. But she never stopped loving Pawee.

Six years later, Pawee returns. Between an old love deeply imprinted in her heart, and a new love with dreams of a bright future... Who is she going to choose?

trailers.title: Offical Trailer 1 | The Infinite Love 爱的奇迹 ปาฏิหาริย์รัก
